chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 782 of 2017 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For orders on CMA No.9913/2018 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 26.10.2023 Mr. Kashif Hussain Shaikh, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Jamshed Ahmed Faiz, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel holding brief submits that the purpose of this petition has been served and, therefore, petitioner does not press the petition. However, if any need arises on the subject matter, he would file a fresh petition. Accordingly, this petition, in view of above, is disposed of along with listed application, having served its purpose. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
